---
title: "LLM_as_a_judge_analysis_thesis"
author: "Ilse Hamers"
date: "2026-05-10"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# readme
This script is the analysis of the LLM-as-a-judge survey of experts and LLMs

## Libraries
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(readxl)
library(irr)
library(psych)
library(ggplot2)
library(forcats)
library(tibble)
```


## Expert data
```{r}
data_dir <- Sys.getenv("ANEMIA_DATA_DIR", unset = "data")

pad_expert <- file.path(data_dir,"LLM-as-a-judge_qualtrics.xlsx")
data_expert <- read_excel(pad_expert)

data_expert <- data_expert %>%
  select(-'Duration (in seconds)', -'Q154', -'SC0') %>%
  dplyr::slice(-1)

data_expert_format <- data_expert %>%
  mutate(Beoordelaar = as.character(row_number())) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols      = -Beoordelaar,
    names_to  = c("Case", ".value"),
    names_pattern = "(\\d+)([a-e])"
  ) %>%
  rename(
    'Clinical correctness' = a,
    Nuance = b,
    Hallucination = c,
    Format = d,
    Language = e
  ) %>%
  mutate(across(c('Clinical correctness', Nuance, Hallucination, Format, Language),
                as.numeric))
```

## LLM data
```{r}
pad_llm <- file.path(data_dir,"LLM-as-a-judge_LLMs.xlsx")
data_llm <- read_excel(pad_llm) %>%
  mutate(Case = as.character(Case))
```

## function: ICC per dimension
```{r}
dimensies <- c('Clinical correctness', 'Nuance', 'Hallucination', 'Format', 'Language')

bereken_icc_rij <- function(wide_mat, dim_naam) {
  res_C1 <- irr::icc(wide_mat, model = "twoway", type = "consistency", unit = "single")
  res_A1 <- irr::icc(wide_mat, model = "twoway", type = "agreement",   unit = "single")
  res_C3 <- irr::icc(wide_mat, model = "twoway", type = "consistency", unit = "average")
  res_A3 <- irr::icc(wide_mat, model = "twoway", type = "agreement",   unit = "average")

  tibble::tibble(
    Dimensie = dim_naam,
    `ICC(C,1)` = round(res_C1$value, 3),
    `C1 95% CI` = sprintf("[%.3f, %.3f]", res_C1$lbound, res_C1$ubound),
    `ICC(A,1)` = round(res_A1$value, 3),
    `A1 95% CI` = sprintf("[%.3f, %.3f]", res_A1$lbound, res_A1$ubound),
    `ICC(C,3)` = round(res_C3$value, 3),
    `C3 95% CI` = sprintf("[%.3f, %.3f]", res_C3$lbound, res_C3$ubound),
    `ICC(A,3)` = round(res_A3$value, 3),
    `A3 95% CI` = sprintf("[%.3f, %.3f]", res_A3$lbound, res_A3$ubound)
  )
}

icc_analyse <- function(data_long) {
  resultaten <- lapply(dimensies, function(dim) {
    wide <- data_long %>%
      select(Case, Beoordelaar, all_of(dim)) %>%
      pivot_wider(names_from = Beoordelaar, values_from = all_of(dim)) %>%
      select(-Case) %>%
      as.data.frame()

    bereken_icc_rij(wide, dim_naam = dim)
  })

  overall_wide <- data_long %>%
    mutate(Overall = rowMeans(across(all_of(dimensies)), na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
    select(Case, Beoordelaar, Overall) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = Beoordelaar, values_from = Overall) %>%
    select(-Case) %>%
    as.data.frame()

  overall_rij <- bereken_icc_rij(overall_wide, dim_naam = "Overall (mean)")

  bind_rows(resultaten, overall_rij)
}
```

## ICC – Expert
```{r}
icc_expert <- icc_analyse(data_expert_format)

knitr::kable(
  icc_expert,
  caption = "ICC for human experts (n = 6)"
)
```

## ICC - LLM
```{r}
data_llm_format <- data_llm %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(dimensies), as.numeric))

modellen <- unique(data_llm_format$Beoordelaar)
```

```{r}
icc_llm_alle <- icc_analyse(data_llm_format)

knitr::kable(
  icc_llm_alle,
  caption = "ICC for LLMs"
)
```

### without Llama
```{r}
data_llm_zonder_llama <- data_llm_format %>%
  filter(!grepl("llama", Beoordelaar, ignore.case = TRUE))

icc_llm_zonder_llama <- icc_analyse(data_llm_zonder_llama)

knitr::kable(
  icc_llm_zonder_llama,
  caption = "ICC for LLMs without Llama 3.1 8B"
)
```


## Comparison expert and LLM

```{r}
samenvatting <- bind_rows(
  icc_expert %>% mutate(Groep = "Experts (n=6)", .before = 1),
  icc_llm_alle  %>% mutate(Groep = "LLMs – alle 4 modellen", .before = 1),
  icc_llm_zonder_llama %>% mutate(Groep = "LLMs – zonder Llama 3.1 8B (n=3)", .before = 1)
)

knitr::kable(
  samenvatting,
  caption = "Comparison of ICC values"
)
```

# more descriptives

## expert
```{r}
expert_gem <- data_expert_format %>%
  group_by(Case) %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(dimensies),
                   ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
                   .names = "expert_{.col}"),
            .groups = "drop")
```

```{r}
model_type <- tibble(
  Beoordelaar = unique(data_llm_format$Beoordelaar),
  Model_type  = ifelse(
    grepl("llama", unique(data_llm_format$Beoordelaar), ignore.case = TRUE),
    "Lokaal model",
    "Groot model"
  )
)

data_llm_format <- data_llm_format %>%
  left_join(model_type, by = "Beoordelaar")
```

# bias from expert average
```{r}
bias_long <- data_llm_format %>%
  left_join(expert_gem, by = "Case") %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      all_of(dimensies),
      ~ .x - get(paste0("expert_", cur_column())),
      .names = "bias_{.col}"
    )
  )

bias_long <- bias_long %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(bias_Totaal = mean(c_across(starts_with("bias_")), na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup()

bias_tabel <- bias_long %>%
  group_by(Beoordelaar, Model_type) %>%
  summarise(
    across(
      starts_with("bias_"),
      list(
        gem = ~ round(mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
        sd = ~ round(sd(.x,   na.rm = TRUE), 3)
      ),
      .names = "{.col}_{.fn}"
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

grote_modellen_rij <- bias_long %>%
  filter(Model_type == "Groot model") %>%
  summarise(
    across(
      starts_with("bias_"),
      list(
        gem = ~ round(mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
        sd = ~ round(sd(.x,   na.rm = TRUE), 3)
      ),
      .names = "{.col}_{.fn}"
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Beoordelaar = "Gemiddelde Grote Modellen",
    Model_type = "Groot model"
  )

bias_tabel <- bind_rows(bias_tabel, grote_modellen_rij) %>%
  select(Beoordelaar, Model_type, ends_with("_gem"), ends_with("_sd"))

knitr::kable(
  bias_tabel
)
```


# spearman
```{r}
expert_loo <- data_expert_format %>%
  group_by(Case) %>%
  mutate(
    n_raters = n(),
    across(
      all_of(dimensies),
      ~ (sum(.x, na.rm = TRUE) - .x) / (n_raters - 1),
      .names = "loo_{.col}"
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Spearman per expert againt LOO
spearman_expert <- expert_loo %>%
  group_by(Beoordelaar) %>%
  summarise(
    across(
      all_of(dimensies),
      ~ cor.test(.x, get(paste0("loo_", cur_column())),
                 method = "spearman", exact = FALSE)$estimate,
      .names = "rho_{.col}"
    ),
    rho_Overall = cor.test(
      rowMeans(across(all_of(dimensies)), na.rm = TRUE),
      rowMeans(across(all_of(paste0("loo_", dimensies))), na.rm = TRUE),
      method = "spearman", exact = FALSE
    )$estimate,
    Model_type = "Experts",
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Spearman per LLM against expert average
spearman_llm <- data_llm_format %>%
  left_join(expert_gem, by = "Case") %>%
  group_by(Beoordelaar, Model_type) %>%
  summarise(
    across(
      all_of(dimensies),
      ~ cor.test(.x, get(paste0("expert_", cur_column())),
                 method = "spearman", exact = FALSE)$estimate,
      .names = "rho_{.col}"
    ),
    rho_Overall = cor.test(
      rowMeans(across(all_of(dimensies)), na.rm = TRUE),
      rowMeans(across(all_of(paste0("expert_", dimensies))), na.rm = TRUE),
      method = "spearman", exact = FALSE
    )$estimate,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Combineren
spearman_alle <- bind_rows(spearman_expert, spearman_llm) %>%
  mutate(
    Model_type  = factor(Model_type,
                         levels = c("Experts", "Groot model", "Lokaal model")),
    Beoord_kort = case_when(
      Model_type == "Experts"                                 ~ paste0("E", Beoordelaar),
      grepl("gemini", Beoordelaar, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Gemini",
      grepl("claude|sonnet", Beoordelaar, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Claude",
      grepl("gpt", Beoordelaar, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "GPT-4o",
      grepl("llama", Beoordelaar, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Llama",
      TRUE ~ Beoordelaar
    )
  )

knitr::kable(
  spearman_alle %>%
    select(Beoordelaar, Model_type, starts_with("rho_")) %>%
    arrange(Model_type, desc(rho_Overall)),
  digits = 3
)
```

# heatmap of spearman
```{r}
heatmap_data <- spearman_alle %>%
  select(Beoordelaar, Model_type, Beoord_kort, starts_with("rho_")) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("rho_"),
               names_to = "Dimensie",
               values_to = "rho") %>%
  mutate(
    Dimensie = sub("^rho_", "", Dimensie),
    Model_type = factor(Model_type,
                        levels = c("Experts", "Groot model", "Lokaal model"),
                        labels = c("Experts", "Large", "Local"))
  )

ggplot(heatmap_data, aes(x = Dimensie, y = Beoord_kort, fill = rho)) +
  geom_tile(colour = "white", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.2f", rho)),
            size = 3.2, colour = "black") +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "#687c8f",
    mid = "white",
    high = "#bc4242",
    midpoint = 0.5,
    limits = c(0, 1),
    oob = scales::squish,
    name = "Spearman rho"
  ) +
  facet_grid(Model_type ~ ., scales = "free_y", space = "free_y") +
  labs(
    title = "Spearman rho per rater and dimension",
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90", colour = NA),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 9),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 25, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 9, colour = "grey40"),
    legend.key.width = unit(1.5, "cm")
  )
```
